title: Missing-state fault baseline scenario
description: Deterministic scenario skeleton for a representative missing-state or missing-required-key case. This file is an integration asset and must remain aligned with frozen assets under common/.

steps.description: Publish a missing-device-state fault fixture through the registry-aligned operational context input plane.
Observe the verification-safe audit stream and capture the conservative missing-state handling outcome.

notes: Missing-state cases should distinguish policy-input omissions from validator or action-schema omissions during later detailed expansion.
This skeleton remains an integration asset and must not redefine required-key truth outside the frozen schema baseline.
This baseline scenario uses a missing-device-state fixture that preserves environmental_context.doorbell_detected=false.
A separate negative fixture intentionally omits doorbell_detected and should only be used by explicit negative schema-boundary tests.
